title: Organic Cotton Summit 2026 targets supply chain, production challenges
content: Efforts to strengthen global supply chains and scale sustainable cotton production will take centre stage at the Organic Cotton Summit in Istanbul.

title: How AI, resale, nearshoring are reshaping apparel in 2026
content: After a GlobalData report outlined the trends set to redefine apparel in 2026, Just Style examines how they're already playing out.
